sequence.variables:
% general setup sample_rate = float(250000000,1e7,1.2e9)
% parameters for CPMG N = float(8,0,1e4) tau = float(2e-6,0,1) mod_depth = float(1,0,1); length_pi = float(52e-9, 2e-9, 0.5) phase_y = float(90,-360,360) phase_ym = float(270,-360,360)
switch_delay = float(1.000000000000000e-07,0,100e-9); wait_time = float(2e-6, 0,1) %delay_wrt_1mus = float(68e-9,0,500e-9) %calibrated by PL curve 11-08-05 13-17-48 delay_wrt_1mus = float(0.2e-6,-0.1,0.1) % DLnsec LASER 1DExp-seq-Rabimodulated-vary-delay_wrt_1mus-2023-10-09-183857
%adiabatic inversion do_adiabatic_inversion = boolean(0) sweep_range = float(100e6, 80e6, 500e6) sweep_time = float(1e-6, 100e-9, 10e-6)
mw_freq = float(3.874400000000000e+09, 1e6, 15e9) mw_ampl = float(-5, -20, 15) ampIQ = float(5,-30,17) %in dBm freqIQ = float(50e6, 0,500*1e6) detuning = float(0,-10e6,10e6)
